CustomField.label: Chess Player Email
CustomField.description: The signed-in player's real email, passed from the web app via MIAW hidden prechat field and written here by the Omni routing flow. The Chess Coach agent reads it (@MessagingSession.Chess_Player_Email__c) and passes it to ChessCoachGetLiveGame, which pulls the live board from Rails keyed by email — bypassing the unreliable @MessagingEndUser.ContactId context, which arrives null at reasoning time.
